summary: Feature testing complete: Admin can set login/password for teachers. All 6 features tested and working correctly.

minor.issue: Endpoint returns 405 Method Not Allowed - no delete functionality for teachers

features_tested.Admin: Password field visible in teacher: PASS - Password field with label 'Пароль (оставьте пустым для автогенерации)' is visible in create mode
features_tested.Admin: Create teacher with custom passwo: PASS - Teacher created with custom password can login successfully
features_tested.Admin: Create teacher with auto-generate: PASS - When no password provided, server auto-generates a 10-char password and returns it
features_tested.Admin: Edit teacher and change password: PASS - Password can be changed via edit form, old password stops working, new password works
features_tested.Auth: Login with password set by admin: PASS - New user can login with credentials set by admin
features_tested.Auth: New user sees tasks, modules, docu: PASS - Dashboard shows tasks (5), services (8), modules (3), and documents

critical_code_review_comments: TeacherCreate model correctly has optional password field (line 118 in server.py)
generate_password() helper creates secure 10-char passwords using secrets module
Password is stored in teachers collection and queried on login (line 405)
GET /api/admin/teachers correctly excludes password from response for security (line 613: {'_id': 0, 'password': 0})
PUT /api/admin/teachers/{id} only updates password if non-empty string provided (line 654-655)
Frontend shows appropriate hints for create vs edit mode
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test teachers during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Teacher password feature is fully implemented and working. Password field added to admin teacher form with auto-generation option. Login validates email+password from teachers collection. Note: DELETE endpoint for teachers is not implemented (returns 405).
